CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.description: Increase damage dealt and damage taken by 25%. Buff is removed when you take unblocked damage from an enemy.
CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.smartDescripti: Increase damage dealt and damage taken by 25%. Buff is removed when you take unblocked damage from an enemy.
CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.title: Punisher Mode
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.smartDescript: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.title: Counterstance
CLOUD-SHOCK_POWER.description: Shocked creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Shock is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
CLOUD-SHOCK_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, lose|its turn, loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Shock[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
CLOUD-SHOCK_POWER.title: Shock
CLOUD-SCORCH_POWER.description: Scorched creatures deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage with Attacks.
CLOUD-SCORCH_POWER.title: Scorch
CLOUD-FREEZE_POWER.description: Frozen creatures take [blue]25%[/blue] more damage from Attacks.
CLOUD-FREEZE_POWER.smartDescription: Receive [blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
CLOUD-FREEZE_POWER.title: Freeze
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.description: Gain Limit Break when stack reaches [blue]100[/blue]. Gain [blue]5[/blue] stack each turn. Gain [blue]3[/blue] stack when you attack and when you take blocked damage. Gain stack equal to damage taken.
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.smartDescription: Gain Limit Break when stack reaches [blue]100[/blue]. Gain stack each turn, when you take attack, and when you take damage.
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.title: Limit
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.descriptio: Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.smartDescr: Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.title: Passing The Torch
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH_POWER.title: Cross Slash
CLOUD-PRIME_MODE_POWER.title: Prime Mode
